arts.ttl: Former Wigan Athletic man recovering after suffering two strokes
arts.sum: The family of former Wigan Athletic man Tommy Widdrington say he is recovering well after suffering two strokes.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic skipper opens up on special relationship unpinning mean streak
arts.sum: Jason Kerr has opened up on his special relationship with Will Aimson that has helped Wigan Athletic become one of the meanest defences in the EFL.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic chief sets out 'demands' for January - 'Get it done...'
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney has reiterated his intention to again put 'big pressure' on sporting director Gregor Rioch and head of recruitment Stephen Gormal to make sure Wigan Athletic are ready to come flying out of the blocks in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Leyton Orient - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Leyton Orient, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss acknowledges biggest error this term - '...and it's my fault...'
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic boss Shaun Maloney has revealed what has been 'the biggest thing I've got wrong' this season.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss sets bold festive challenge for players
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney has set Wigan Athletic a festive challenge - to be as close to the League One play-off picture by New Year's Day.

A narrow defeat at Huddersfield, combined with results going against them elsewhere, mean Wigan are just two points above the relegation zone. The Latics have won their last four home matches against...
